headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 5
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Jun 5, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Today crystallized the growth-to-defensive rotation as tech weakness broadened while healthcare and financials absorbed flows. The volatility spike underscores positioning stress across risk assets. Tomorrow's focus shifts to whether this defensive bid sustains or represents tactical refuge ahead of renewed risk appetite.
